title: General Caster Formula for Pushing Timelines that Land on Weekend
excerpt: Does anyone have a General Caster forumla that they use to push timelines by a day or two if they land on a weekend? I can’t find a way to take weekend days out of the timeline column  and we’re using formulas to set tim…

posts.author: jpomp (Jackie Pomposelli)
posts.cookedHtml: Does anyone have a General Caster forumla that they use to push timelines by a day or two if they land on a weekend? I can’t find a way to take weekend days out of the timeline column and we’re using formulas to set timelines based on project type, but we don’t want timeline dates to land on weekends.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @jpomp,

I’m not sure if this is possible using General Caster but you can use the Date Check app for this. Basically, it involves choosing your non-working days and the app will automatically update the date to the nearest working day using automations. Here is a demo
